steps.title: Read the minimum and maximum from each box plot
steps.content:
The range of a dataset is the difference between its maximum and minimum values. Reading the whiskers (the endpoints of each box plot):

Class A: minimum ≈ 2, maximum ≈ 10
Class B: minimum ≈ 0, maximum ≈ 12

steps.title: Calculate the range for each class
Find the positive difference between the ranges
steps.content: Positive difference $= |8 - 12| = 4$. That matches choice 4 — the answer is 4.
